channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: G-MODE Archives+ Namco Chronicle launches May 28 in Japan
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch

Priced at 800 yen.

The G-MODE Archives+ release of Namco-developed game Namco Chronicle will launch for Switch via Nintendo eShop and PC via Steam on May 28 in Japan for 800 yen, G-MODE Corporation announced.

Namco Chronicle is a strategy RPG that originally launched for feature phones on April 1, 2009 in Japan.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Track down the evil force that stole the legendary treasure, Wonder Eggs!

Team up with namco characters and restore peace to the game world!

Key Features

  • A strategy RPG featuring Namco’s retro characters.
  • Characters from multiple game titles appear together.
  • Gorgeous skill animations and dramatic cut-ins.
  • Coordinated combo scenes between characters.
  • A crossover spanning more than 20 characters.
  • A port of a Japanese flip phone title (feature phones popular before smartphones).

(This release does not add elements such as languages and achievements that were not part of the original version.)

Game Overview

This is an original tactical RPG created exclusively for mobile devices, featuring heroes and heroines from a variety of classic namco games.

Game Story

The story spans three distinct parts—Fantasy, City, and Space—and new allies join your party throughout each one.

The characters who come to your aid change depending on the world you explore.

Between tactical simulation stages, adventure segments bring the crossover story to life, featuring memorable interactions between iconic Namco characters.

Popular characters such as Valkyrie from The Adventure of Valkyrie, Gil and Ki from The Tower of Druaga, and Momo from Wonder Momo make an appearance.

Who else will join the adventure? The rest you will have to discover for yourself.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/g-mode-archives-namco-chronicle-launches-may-28-in-japan
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Resident Evil Requiem demo now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Play part of the game's early stages.

A demo for Resident Evil Requiem is now available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store, Capcom announced.

Here are the details:

A new era of survival horror arrives with Resident Evil Requiem, the latest and most immersive entry yet in the iconic Resident Evil series.

Experience terrifying survival horror with FBI analyst Grace Ashcroft, and dive into pulse-pounding action with legendary agent Leon S. Kennedy. Both of their journeys and unique gameplay styles intertwine into a heart-stopping, emotional experience that will chill you to your core.

The demo version allows you to play part of the game’s early stages. Please note that save data from the demo version cannot be transferred to the full version of the game.

Resident Evil Requiem is now available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/resident-evil-requiem-demo-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds ‘Puyo Puyo Content Drop’ update launches May 27
item.content:encoded:
The “Puyo Puyo Content Drop” update for Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds will launch on May 27 at 5:00 p.m. PT / 8:00 p.m. ET, SEGA announced.

The update will include the following content:

  • Arle from Puyo Puyo as a playable character
  • Twinkle Bayoen vehicle

An in-game “Puyo Puyo Festival” will also run from May 28 at 5:00 p.m. PT / 8:00 p.m. ET until May 31 at 4:59 pm. PT / 7:59 p.m. ET.

Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/sonic-racing-crossworlds-puyo-puyo-content-drop-update-launches-may-27
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
